titleStmt.title: SII 29.33: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 33. (A.R. No. 60 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the Museum within the compound of the Sōmēśvara temple [Museum Acc. No. 81].

The record engraved on two faces of the pillar registers a grant of income from the kiṟudeṟe taxes of the dēvabhōga village Gāḍicheṟuvu situated in Ānemārga-70 for worship and offerings in the temples of Svayambhu-Sōmēśvara and Nanni nārāyaṇa Vishṇu by mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Kōṭeya Bhīmarasa, who bears among others, the epithet mānyakaṭaka-puravarēśvara. The grant was made when he (the donor) was ruling Koḷḷipāke-7000 while Chālukya Trailōkyamalla was ruling over the empire.
The record is dated Śaka 989, Plavaṅga, Vaiśākha śu. 5 Sōmavāra. It corresponds to 1067 A.D., April 21. The week day was however, Saturday and not Monday (as stated in the record).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuva
nāśraya śrī pṛ
thvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
ya kuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matraiḷōkyamalla
dēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravardhamāna mācaṁdrā
rkatāra(ṁ) saluttamire
tatpāda padmōpajīvi sa
madhigata paṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśva
ra śrī mānyakaṭaka
puravarēśvara nanni mā
rttaṇḍa gaṇḍabhēruṇḍa
kadana pracaṁḍa śrī
kōṭeya bhīmarasa
r (koḷḷipāke)ercchā

siramanāḷutta sakavarṣa
989 neya plavaṁga saṁva
tsarada vaiśākha suda 5
sōmavāra saṁkrānti nimi
ttadandu śrī rājarājō
koḷḷipākeyā hiriya
keṟeyēriya keḷagaṇa
śrī svayaṁbhū sōmēśva
ra dēvarggemāparisūtra
doḷagaṇa nanni nārāyaṇa
viṣṇu dēvarggemāddānemā
rgamerppattaṟa baḷiya
dēvabhōga gāḍiceṟuvu
na (kiṟude)ṟe
nivēdyakke
biṭṭa (ru) . śrī svadattā pa
radatta vāyō harēti
vasundharā śaṣṭirvvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
madvaṁśajā parama
hīpati vaṁśada vāpāsā
da pētamanasā bhuvi bhā
vibhū pāya pālayantiStops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 29.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
